## BaseSessionId type

Session identifier within a single collection (user library session storage). Format: YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS-xxxxxxxx (same as SessionSpec)

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type BaseSessionId = Brand<string, 'BaseSessionId'>;
```
